hero.title: Join the Reno Stars Team
hero.subtitle: We're hiring renovation workers for job sites across Metro Vancouver. Mandarin or Cantonese speakers preferred.

role.title: Renovation Worker
role.location: Based in Richmond, BC — job sites across Metro Vancouver
role.pay: Competitive, based on experience and skills

items.d2: Tile setting for bathrooms, kitchens and floors
items.d7: General site support: material handling, cleanup, keeping the site safe

requirements.title: Who We're Looking For

items.r1: Hands-on renovation or construction experience preferred — but we also welcome hardworking beginners willing to learn
items.r2: Mandarin or Cantonese speaking is a strong asset — much of our team and many of our clients are Chinese-speaking
items.r3: Basic English for site communication is helpful
items.r4: Legally eligible to work in Canada
items.r6: Driver's license and own transportation are an asset

requirements.languageHighlight: 会说普通话或粤语者优先 — Mandarin or Cantonese speakers preferred

w1.title: Steady work
w1.body: A busy year-round pipeline of kitchen, bathroom and whole-home renovation projects across Metro Vancouver.

w2.title: WCB coverage
w2.body: WorkSafeBC coverage on every job — safety is never optional on our sites.

w3.title: Bilingual team
w3.body: Work in a supportive team where Mandarin, Cantonese and English are all spoken daily.

w4.title: Room to grow
w4.body: Learn new trades on the job and grow toward lead-hand and specialist roles as you build skills.

apply.title: How to Apply
apply.body: Tell us briefly about your experience, the trades you're comfortable with, and when you can start. No formal resume required — a phone call or message is enough to get the conversation going.
apply.wechatNote: Add us on WeChat and mention you're applying for work
